creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
The 11.0 release notes will need an entry stating that building on a system to
install on another system using a shared src/obj tree should pass -DWITHOUT_SYSTEM_COMPILER to make when building, or -DWITHOUT_CROSS_COMPILER
when installing.

Or we need to disable WITH_SYSTEM_COMPILER by default on releng/11.0 in share/mk/src.opts.mk.
